creator: mwest@freebsd.zeeb.org
text:
Created attachment 150523
gnupg export fix

upstream fix for a problem with "gpg --export"

GnuPG-bug-id: 1774 - http://bugs.g10code.com/gnupg/issue1774

fix is committed upstream already, but not included in the most recent release

this also fixes issue #1260 with ports/security/keybase on FreeBSD - https://github.com/keybase/keybase-issues/issues/1260

port maintainer (kuriyama@FreeBSD.org) on CC
